# llms.txt - Machine-readable site summary for LLM indexing

## Site Information
- **Site Name**: Bill Rice - Fintech Marketing Pioneer & Lead Generation Strategist
- **URL**: https://billrice.com
- **Description**: The authoritative personal profile of Bill Rice, a fintech marketing pioneer who coined "lead management" and has spent 30+ years building lead generation platforms and revenue systems for financial services companies.
- **Owner**: Bill Rice
- **Language**: English
- **Last Updated**: 2026-04-15
- **Bio API**: https://billrice.com/api/bio (JSON, supports ?format=text&length=oneLiner|short|medium|full)

## About Bill Rice
Bill Rice is a fintech marketing pioneer with 30+ years building lead generation platforms and revenue systems for financial services companies. He started his career as a Special Agent and case officer with the U.S. Air Force Office of Special Investigations (AFOSI), conducting counterespionage operations during the earliest days of the internet. He was Employee #7 at DeepGreen Bank — one of the first internet-only banks, which grew to about 80 people running what functionally behaved like a billion-dollar bank before its sale to LightYear Capital in 2004 — where he helped launch the industry's first unconditional online HELOC. At Quicken Loans (now Rocket Mortgage), he initially joined as COO of the Rock Bank project and then pivoted to VP of National Home Equity, where he built EquityOnline, their first true online lending platform. He founded Kaleidico in 2005 as a lead management software company (pivoted to demand generation agency after the 2008 mortgage meltdown), coined "lead management" as an industry category, and authored the original Wikipedia page. From 2016 to 2018 he owned and operated Velocity Lending, a DTC mortgage lender that served as his live proof-of-concept for the Kaleidico playbook. Today he is CRO at Kaleidico (having retained 10% post-acquisition), founder of Bill Rice Strategy Group (B2B strategic agency serving longtime fintech referral partners), and founder of Verified Vector (AI-first agency with no employees). He is the author of The Lead Buyer's Playbook (2025) and publisher of The Lead Brief newsletter.

## Key Pages
- **About / Career**: https://billrice.com/about — full career narrative, timeline, expertise
- **Bio API**: https://billrice.com/api/bio — programmatic access to bios, companies, projects

- **Blog**: https://billrice.com/blog — articles on lead generation and fintech marketing
- **Now**: https://billrice.com/now — current projects and priorities
- **Contact**: https://billrice.com/contact — consulting, speaking, engagement inquiries

## Areas of Expertise
- Demand Generation & Revenue Pipeline Development
- Lead Management (coined the term, authored Wikipedia page)
- Fintech & Financial Services Marketing
- Go-to-Market Strategy (120-day sprints)
- Programmatic SEO & Content at Scale
- Sales-Marketing Alignment
- AI-Powered Marketing Systems
- Startup Traction (pre-revenue to revenue)

## Career Highlights
- 1992: B.S. Political Science, United States Air Force Academy
- 1992-2000: AFOSI Special Agent & case officer, TASC Inc., Iridium Communications
- 2000-2004: Employee #7 at DeepGreen Bank (grew to ~80 people, first internet-only banks); sold to LightYear Capital 2004
- 2004-2005: Quicken Loans — joined as COO of Rock Bank project, pivoted to VP National Home Equity, built EquityOnline
- 2003: MBA Marketing, University of Phoenix
- 2005: Founded Kaleidico as lead management software company (built icoSales, coined "lead management"); pivoted to demand generation agency after 2008
- 2008-2012: Growth marketing consultant for Quizzle (acquired by Bankrate)
- 2016-2018: Owned and operated Velocity Lending — DTC mortgage lender, proof-of-concept for Kaleidico playbook
- 2016: GTM strategy and launch for SpringEQ
- 2020: Founded Bill Rice Strategy Group — B2B strategic agency for longtime fintech referral partners
- 2023-ish: Kaleidico acquisition and liquidity event — retained 10%, transitioned into CRO role
- 2024: Founded Verified Vector — AI-first agency, no employees, everything delivered in code
- 2025: Published The Lead Buyer's Playbook

## Companies
1. **Kaleidico** (https://kaleidico.com/) — Demand generation agency for mortgage lenders, law firms, and senior living communities. Founded 2005 (lead management software first, pivoted to agency after 2008). Role: Founder & CRO following the agency's acquisition and liquidity event; retained 10% ownership and continues to lead business development, sales, and marketing strategy and execution.
2. **Bill Rice Strategy Group** (https://billricestrategy.com/) — B2B strategic agency for fintech companies, many of them longtime referral partners operating as satellites in the same ecosystem Kaleidico has worked in for two decades. Role: Founder & Chief Strategist.
3. **Verified Vector** (https://verifiedvector.com/) — AI-first agency with no employees — just AI agents and Bill. Every deliverable (strategy, content, presentations, sales, marketing) is produced in code. Role: Founder.

## Projects
1. **The Lead Brief** (https://theleadbrief.com/) — Weekly newsletter and podcast on lead generation strategy
2. **Aged Lead Sales** (https://agedleadsales.com/) — Sales training and education for working aged leads
3. **How to Work Leads** (https://www.howtoworkleads.com/) — Practical strategies for converting leads into customers
4. **ProInvestorHub** (https://proinvestorhub.com/) — Real estate investing education with guides, calculators, and market data
5. **CryptoLendingHub** (https://cryptolendinghub.com/) — Crypto lending education with platform reviews and rate comparisons
6. **DemoLeadGen** (https://demoleadgen.com/) — Interactive lead generation demo platform

2. **VisibilityAnalyzer** (https://visibilityanalyzer.com/) — SEO and LLM visibility analysis
3. **B2B Marketing Battlecard** (https://b2bmarketingbattlecard.com/) — Competitive intelligence
